name: agent-architecture
description: Architectural skills for designing multi-agent systems, memory, tool interfaces, filesystem context, and hosted agents.

interface.shortDescription: Patterns for robust agent system design.
interface.longDescription: A bundle of architectural skills for multi-agent coordination, memory systems, tool design, filesystem context, and hosted agent execution.
defaultPrompt: Design a multi-agent architecture for a coding workflow.
Recommend a memory architecture for a long-running agent.
Help me design tools an agent can use reliably.
